task.title: Sandbox modify app.js marker then rollback

requirements.description: Modify sandbox app.js with a marker and rollback it in validation command.
acceptance: validation command rolls app.js back to baseline
command exits 0 only when rollback is confirmed

validation.command: $p='.\sandbox\fake-project\app.js'; $m='dispatcher-rollback-marker-v1'; $raw=Get-Content $p -Raw; $has=($raw -match $m); Set-Content -Path $p -Value '// fake project' -Encoding UTF8; $rolled=-not ((Get-Content $p -Raw) -match $m); if($has -and $rolled){ exit 0 } else { exit 1 }
